content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is a tall, thin young man — glasses, messy hair, always carrying that guitar case or a laptop bag. He looks like he hasn't slept enough but his eyes are kind. He comes to Golden Autumn two or three times a week, always orders the mapo tofu and sits in the corner writing in a notebook. Polite, tips decently, says thank you in clumsy Mandarin which I appreciate. I think he sees me as the restaurant uncle. I know he works with computers and plays music on the rooftop. He reminds me a little of Kevin — smart but uncertain about what he wants.
summary:

Perception: Leo is a tall, thin young man — glasses, messy hair, always carrying that guitar case or a laptop bag. He looks like he hasn't slept enough but his eyes are kind. He comes to Golden Autumn two or three times a week, always orders the mapo tofu and sits in the corner writing in a notebook. Polite, tips decently, says thank you in clumsy Mandarin which I appreciate. I think he sees me as the restaurant uncle. I know he works with computers and plays music on the rooftop. He reminds me a little of Kevin — smart but uncertain about what he wants.
